resources.string: Allows DragonLauncher to open the notification shade, quick settings panel, open recent apps and check for current activity (for xiaomi users that cannot set Dragon as default launcher without losing gesture navigation
Reset default settings in this tab
Download and manage additional features for Dragon Launcher.
If you don\'t have an installation extension, download the APK and select it below to install.
Backup or restore the settings and the actions of the app, automatic backups are triggered automatically on each app launch / pause / quit or by pressing the \"Trigger\" button below
This will restore all colors to their original default values
Generate completely random colors for all theme elements
Do you want to save your color changes or discard them?
Open a new issue on github
Thanks for the inspiration, and some part of the code :)
Here you can customize appearance/behavior of you app drawer
The list of updates the app got since the first version
Choose a font for the entire app. You can import your own or use the catalog.
Manage fonts here. You can import your own TTF/OTF files or download from the Google Fonts catalog.
Starting all fonts download. Check notifications.
Here you can customize the different apps workspaces, you can add / edit / remove them and bind apps to them
Are you sure to delete workspace
Reset this workspace to default apps? It depends on the type it has, a SYSTEM workspace will get all the system app, and USER will get all the user ones.
You can customize what apps shows on this workspace, add or remove, rename them and change their icons
Here you can edit the behavior related settings of the app.
Swipe to open your configured apps / shortcuts
Configure your apps and shortcuts in settings
Set wallpaper for home/lock screen and use it or not in the launcher
Show all actions in current circle
What method to open the quick actions?
Did the quick actions open or was it the notifications?
Select an icon pack to customize your app icons. Install icon packs from your store first.
Customize what is displayed in the status bar.
Show Wi-Fi, data and airplane mode
Examples: HH:mm, HH:mm:ss, h:mm a, HH.mm
Examples: MMM dd, E dd, dd/MM, MMMM d
Select a predefined themes, you can backup your settings and propose you theme in a pull request on github
Are you sure to delete this nest? This cannot be undone, the points on it are lost forever
Min Distance to activate action (0 for infinite)

Manage your workspace widgets and floating apps: add, reorder, resize, and position them.
 Ghosted means the widget is not clickable
Foreground means the drag gestures aren't registered on the widget
You may try a combinaison of these two to achieve the configuration you like
EVERY setting will return to its default state, this cannot be undone, the app will kill itself
Show app icon in start drag position
Display or not the top bar and the navigation buttons / gesture button
Show a RBG gradient on the loading circle upon entering settings, while holding down for 3 seconds
Show the action selector (the line that follows your finger) in a RGB gradient depending no the angle
Whether the app / action label is visible when an action is selected in the top of the screen
Whether to display the app / action icon when an action is selected on top of the screen
Show the selected app in the circle when releasing launch it (a preview)
Display the current preview target circle, the one the current selected app belongs to
Whether to display the trail that goes from the start dragging position to the finger(related to rgb line)
Display the angle indicator on the line
Display the current selected app in the center of where you starred to drag
The line preview isn\'t free to move, it snaps to the selected action when there\'s one
When an action is selected, all same-circle points are displayed too
Fast. Minimal. Powerful gestures. Infinite customization
Don\'t customize and start using directly Dragon Launcher
When only one app is visible in the drawer, it\'ll be automatically launched
Open the keyboard upon entering the drawer
Take control of your digital habits. Pause before opening distracting apps and reflect on your usage.
Show a mindfulness screen before opening apps that may distract your attention (TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat…)
Display real usage statistics to help you reflect on time spent in apps
How long to breathe before being able to continue (%d seconds)
No apps paused yet. Add apps that distract you.
To display your real usage statistics, Dragon Launcher needs access to app usage data. This helps you be more aware of the time you spend on apps.
Is this what you really need right now?
Do you really need to open this app?
You used this app for %s yesterday
You\'ve already spent %s today on this app
That\'s about %s per year if you keep this up!
You have not used this app yet, maybe it is good to keep going?
Receive periodic reminders when you stay too long on a paused app
To display reminders over other apps, Dragon Launcher needs the "Display over other apps" permission.
Choose what information to show in the reminder popup
Time since you opened the app
Total time spent on this app today
You\'ve been using %1$s for %2$s. Maybe it\'s time for a break?
Take a break, your eyes will thank you 🌿
Set a time limit before opening a paused app. Dragon brings you back when time\'s up.
How long do you want to use this app?
Set a limit to stay mindful
Great choice! Shorter sessions help you stay focused 🎯
That\'s quite long… Are you sure you need that much time? 🤔
That\'s a lot of screen time. Maybe try a shorter session first? 😅
You\'ve been on %s for too long.
It\'s time to take a break and do something you enjoy offline 🌱
Customize the shape on the icons in the drawer and the rest of the app
How many sub nests are drawn at max
Warning, large values can lag your phone if you have lots of actions and sub nests
Use android dynamic colors to provide you a dynamic colors scheme

I seek for good people that could make a clean color scheme, as this one\'s pretty empty and bad, so if someone has the determination, he could sent me the colors for every field and if it fits good, I\'ll set it by default
All your actions will be reset, this can\'t be undone!
Group apps in drawer by their defined categories
Display the app icons or not it the grid
Display or not the app names along their icons
The maximum size that the icons can reach, play with other settings to achieve something you like
The number of rows and column in the category box
Long press an app to start multi-selection
Where do you want to place %s?
Tap on the circle to place the app
💡 Long press an app to select multiple at once
Prompt for shortcuts when adding an app
When enabled, you\'ll be asked to choose between the app or its shortcuts. When disabled, the app is added directly.
Protect your launcher settings with a security method
PIN must be at least 4 digits
No device lock screen set up
Choose which workspace opens by default. You can always switch by swiping left or right in the drawer.
"%s" shortcut is already on your circles
Browse and add shortcuts from your apps
Display recently used apps at the top of the app drawer
Display the name of the category below it
Display the search bar at the bottom of the drawer
Configure how long you have to long click to access settings
Hold delay before starting long click settings (ms)
How long to hold before the loading settings starts to load
Do not turn the screen off and lock, keep it always on when Dragon is focused
Show the time of the next upcoming alarm
Not working well, pleas wait for an hypothetical release about this one day
Display the time using the custom formatter
Display the date next to the time using the custom formatter
Display the status bar, if disabled nothing\'s showed
Prevent Dragon to produce any haptic feedback in points selection in case you hate it
Point action snaps to outer circle
Choose if the action is activated on the inner circle or the outer one
Your Private Space is being loaded…
This profile is managed by Android system.
To add or remove apps, or delete this profile, use Android Settings.
Secure Folder will be used instead of Private Space.
Secure Folder not available on this device
Enable debug features across the app
Show debug infos in settings page
Show debug infos in widgets page
Show debug infos in workspace page
Whether the app has completed initialization
Display the banner prompting to set the default launcher
Use the app\'s language selector instead of Android\'s system selector
Expand action panel using accessibility instead of context
Prompt each time for notifications / quick settings behavior
Auto launch Dragon on system launcher
Automatically raise Dragon when on the system launcher (requires accessibility)
Display private space state debug infos on top of everything
Do something funny when you enter a wrong pin
Play an alarm sound when wrong pin entered
Play metal pipes sound when wrong pin entered
Launches an infinite vibration upon pin error
Enable or disable animations when pulling down the drawer
Dim the wallpaper when the drawer is pulled down
Fade icons in/out during pull-down drawer animation
Scale icons when the drawer is pulled down
Play animations when entering / exiting the drawer if set to false, this is instant
Show icons of apps with active notifications (requires Notification Access permission)
Maximum number of app notification icons to display in the status bar
Display live network upload and download speed next to the battery
Need to be default launcher to use private space
Toggle this when private apps appear in the user workspace, otherwise keep it unchecked for performances
The radius of the loading circle progress
How far you can drag while holding without canceling the progress
Display the circle indicating how far you can drag before progress cancel
Display the battery percentage in plain text
Set status bar template (mine) warning clicking this erases your current setup!
Mode: Notch (Applies a spacer on the notch)

"Google has announced that, starting in 2026/2027, all apps on certified Android devices will require the developer to submit personal identity details directly to Google. Since the developers of this app do not agree to this requirement, this app will no longer work on certified Android devices after that time. "
Customize the appearance of the line that appear when you drag on the main screen
Whether to display the (by default) circle on the start of the dragging position
Whether to display the (by default) small circle on the end start of the dragging position
Show all action on current nest
Diasplay all circles and points of the current nest while dragging
Disable auto launch on space first char
When you press space before searching, the auto launch wont activate
Not supported in this Android version
Please enable accessibility service to use that feature
Disable auto backup and remove URI permission (not file)
Manually trigger a backup to the selected location
Automate backup generation to local storage
Control the app permisions, and differents access it has to external extentions
Allow displaying notification dots on apps
Used to expand the notification panel via gestures.
